# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

apiVersion: elasticsearch.k8s.elastic.co/v1alpha1
kind: SnapshotRepository
metadata:
  name: s3-snapshot-repo
spec:
  type: s3
  settings:
    bucket: my-backup-bucket
    region: us-east-1
    access_key_id: your-access-key-id
    secret_access_key: your-secret-access-key

---
apiVersion: elasticsearch.k8s.elastic.co/v1alpha1
kind: Snapshot
metadata:
  name: daily-snapshot
spec:
  repository: s3-snapshot-repo
  snapshotName: daily-snapshot-$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)
  includeGlobalState: false
  ignoreUnavailable: true

---
apiVersion: elasticsearch.k8s.elastic.co/v1alpha1
kind: SnapshotRestore
metadata:
  name: restore-daily-snapshot
spec:
  repository: s3-snapshot-repo
  snapshotName: daily-snapshot-20230401123456
  includeGlobalState: false
